idea.title: Pruner's Tower
idea.hook: Tower-defense in reverse — start with a maxed defense grid and REMOVE turrets each wave to satisfy budget cuts set by city council.
idea.prototype: Vanilla canvas, 8x8 grid pre-populated with 24 turrets across 4 types (cannon/laser/freeze/sniper). Enemies path L→R in waves. Before each wave, council demands: remove N turrets matching criteria (e.g. 'remove 2 lasers' or 'cut grid value by 30'). Refusal = lose. Comply = wave runs with reduced defense. Survive 6 waves.
idea.mutation_of: Yandex strategy cluster (Башни: Военная Стратегия, AOD - Art Of Defense, TABS) crossed with Telegram 'Skill Burn' pruning signal (strategycon/21325 - Total War Medieval III dropping skill trees)
idea.why_novel: Every TD on these portals is additive — buy more towers. Nobody has shipped a subtractive TD where the META challenge is which towers to SACRIFICE. Inverts the entire genre's dopamine loop.
idea.non_timer_pressure: removal quota per wave + 6-wave lives + grid-value budget
idea.lose_condition: Refuse council quota OR enemies reach the right edge 3 times.

sources.examples: Башни: Военная Стратегия, AOD - Art Of Defense, TABS

sources.signal: Total War Medieval III's removal of skill trees — pruning-as-design
Hex Command action-budget pattern — constrained-choice strategy

synthesizer_brief: Mutated-from-portal-trending: Yandex strategy cluster + Telegram Skill Burn pruning signal

alternatives.title: Hex Tribute
alternatives.hook: You're the LOSING general — bribe enemy hexes to defect before your last city falls, using a 3-coin-per-turn budget.

alternatives.title: Drift Forge
alternatives.hook: Reach a target color pattern on a 4x4 grid — but every tap shifts neighbors by -1, simulating design drift through iteration.

alternatives.title: Sausage Beam
alternatives.hook: Roll a laser-mounted sausage around a ring arena — momentum aims the beam, but the beam's recoil pushes you toward the edge.

alternatives.title: Council of Tiles
alternatives.hook: A match-3 board where you DON'T move tiles — you VOTE which color gets removed each turn, and the council majority decides.

alternatives.title: Bills Reverse
alternatives.hook: Idle clicker where you BURN money — find ways to spend down a $999,999 inheritance before midnight relatives arrive to claim it.
